D2 Vision L4 Analyze Reference

Helmholtz-Kohlrausch Effect

slide the saturation and watch the colour read brighter than a grey of exactly the same luminance

Perceived brightness rises with colourfulness, not luminance alone. A vivid patch looks brighter than a grey that reflects exactly as much light.

The two patches carry the identical luminance — confirm it on the meter. Slide the saturation: the colour pulls ahead in apparent brightness, the boost the bar tracks, even though the pixels never change their luminance.
